Tests for the `charAt` method of the `String` object in various scenarios.


## Files
- **[15.05.04.04-001.js](15.05.04.04-001.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the `charAt` method with a negative index on a string.
- **[15.05.04.04-002.js](15.05.04.04-002.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the `charAt` method on a string when the index is out of bounds.
- **[15.05.04.04-003.js](15.05.04.04-003.js.md)**: Tests the `charAt` method of the `String` object to verify it returns the correct character.
- **[15.05.04.04-004.js](15.05.04.04-004.js.md)**: Tests the `charAt` method of the `String` object in JavaScript.
